name: Arc Warden
description: It is not to aid the Ancients that this war is joined, but to destroy them both. This disunity must end.

abilities.name: Runic Infusion
abilities.description: Grants permanent,, and per Power Rune activated by The Self and The Double.

abilities.name: Flux
abilities.description: Deals damage over time on the unit-targeted enemy. The damage is not applied if another enemy unit is near the debuff-affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Magnetic Field
abilities.description: Grants allied units absolute evasion and attack speed bonus within the area-targeted location.

abilities.name: Spark Wraith
abilities.description: Summons a Spark Wraith that activates after an effect delay. Once an enemy is within its search radius, the wraith fuses itself with the target.

abilities.name: Tempest Double
abilities.description: The Self creates a perfect duplication of itself which is considered a hero by most abilities. The Double can use all of The Self's current items and non-ultimate spells, except most consumables and items that would drop on death. The Double has a separate and independent item and ability cooldowns. Creates a Double with all of his basic abilities, without other and inactive. Losing and reacquiring the ability allows Rubick to summon another Double from the previous ability acquisition.

abilities.name: Clone Inventory
abilities.description: 's ability cooldown increases per proc and is bound independently to The Double.
